languages.text: "Оказалось, некоторые наши традиции вызывают у прочих слуг династии отвращение. Кто-то даже шепчется о ереси... Особенно людей смущает наша похоронная традиция. Мы привезли с собой саван-листья и успели положить в них несколько вольнодумцев, а ваши слуги всполошились".

"It turns out that some of our traditions disgust the other servants of the dynasty. Some are even whispering of heresy... People are especially unsettled by our funeral rites. We brought shroud-leaves with us and have already placed a few free-thinkers inside them, and your servants started an uproar."
languages.original_text: "Оказалось, некоторые наши традиции вызывают у прочих слуг династии отвращение. Кто-то даже шепчется о ереси... Особенно людей смущает наша похоронная традиция. Мы привезли с собой саван-листья и успели положить в них несколько вольнодумцев, а ваши слуги всполошились".

traits.locale_text: "It turns out some of our traditions disgust the other servants of the dynasty. Some are even whispering of heresy... People are especially unsettled by our funeral rites. We brought shroud-leaves with us and have already placed a few free-thinkers inside them, and your servants started an uproar."

"It turns out that some of our traditions disgust the other servants of the dynasty. Some are even whispering of heresy... People are especially unsettled by our funeral rites. We brought shroud-leaves with us and have already placed a few free-thinkers inside them, and your servants started an uproar."

"It turns out that some of our Zarkovian beliefs are verging on heresy. We've been told that the God-Emperor cannot speak through wind or earth. That these primitive superstitions are forgivable in less developed societies, but we are now crew members on the Rogue Trader's ship..."

"It turns out some of our traditions disgust the other servants of the dynasty. Some are even whispering of heresy... People are especially unsettled by our funeral rites. We brought shroud-leaves with us and have already placed a few free-thinkers inside them, and your servants started an uproar."

"It turns out that some of our traditions disgust the other servants of the dynasty. Some are even whispering of heresy... People are especially unsettled by our funeral rites. We brought shroud-leaves with us and have already placed a few free-thinkers inside them, and your servants started an uproar."

languages.text: 「ザルコビアンの信念の中には、異端の域に達するものがあることが判明した。神皇帝は風や大地を通して語ることができないと教えられた。これらの原始的な迷信は、発展途上社会では許されるが、我々は今はローグトレーダーの船の乗組員である…」
languages.original_text: "It turns out that some of our Zarkovian beliefs are verging on heresy. We've been told that the God-Emperor cannot speak through wind or earth. That these primitive superstitions are forgivable in less developed societies, but we are now crew members on the Rogue Trader's ship..."

languages.text: "Görünüşe göre geleneklerimizden bazıları, hanedanlığın diğer hizmetkârlarını iğrendiriyor. Hatta bazıları kâfirlik fısıltıları yayıyor... İnsanlar özellikle cenaze törenlerimizden rahatsız. Yanımızda kefen yaprağı getirdik ve çoktan birkaç özgür düşünceli kişiyi içlerine yerleştirdik ve sizin hizmetkârlarınız kıyameti kopardı."
languages.original_text: "It turns out that some of our traditions disgust the other servants of the dynasty. Some are even whispering of heresy... People are especially unsettled by our funeral rites. We brought shroud-leaves with us and have already placed a few free-thinkers inside them, and your servants started an uproar."

traits.locale_text: "Görünüşe göre geleneklerimizden bazıları, hanedanlığın diğer hizmetkârlarını iğrendiriyor. Hatta bazıları kâfirlik fısıltıları yayıyor... İnsanlar özellikle cenaze törenlerimizden rahatsız. Yanımızda kefen yaprağı getirdik ve çoktan birkaç özgür düşünceli kişiyi içlerine yerleştirdik ve sizin hizmetkârlarınız kıyameti kopardı."

languages.text: “看来我们的一些传统让王朝的其他仆从感到厌恶。有些人甚至私下说我们是异端……尤其让他们不安的，是我们的丧葬仪式。我们带来了裹尸叶，也已经将几名自由派安置其中，您的仆从为此大为哗然。”
languages.original_text: "It turns out that some of our traditions disgust the other servants of the dynasty. Some are even whispering of heresy... People are especially unsettled by our funeral rites. We brought shroud-leaves with us and have already placed a few free-thinkers inside them, and your servants started an uproar."

traits.locale_text: “看来我们的一些传统让王朝的其他仆从感到厌恶。有些人甚至私下说我们是异端……尤其让他们不安的，是我们的丧葬仪式。我们带来了裹尸叶，也已经将几名自由派安置其中，您的仆从为此大为哗然。”

languages.text: "Wie es scheint, stoßen einige unserer Traditionen die anderen Diener der Dynastie ab. Sogar von Ketzerei ist die Rede ... Die Leute stören sich vor allem an unseren Bestattungsriten. Wir haben Schleierblätter mitgebracht und einige wenige Freidenker darin eingehüllt, das hat Eure Diener empört."
languages.original_text: "It turns out that some of our traditions disgust the other servants of the dynasty. Some are even whispering of heresy... People are especially unsettled by our funeral rites. We brought shroud-leaves with us and have already placed a few free-thinkers inside them, and your servants started an uproar."

traits.locale_text: "Wie es scheint, stoßen einige unserer Traditionen die anderen Diener der Dynastie ab. Sogar von Ketzerei ist die Rede ... Die Leute stören sich vor allem an unseren Bestattungsriten. Wir haben Schleierblätter mitgebracht und einige wenige Freidenker darin eingehüllt, das hat Eure Diener empört."

languages.text: « J'ai appris que certaines de nos traditions dégoûtent les autres serviteurs de la dynastie. Certains nous traitent même d'hérétiques... Les gens semblent particulièrement choqués par nos rites mortuaires. Nous avons déjà placé quelques incrédules dans des linceuls de feuilles, mais vos serviteurs ont commencé à protester. »
languages.original_text: "It turns out that some of our traditions disgust the other servants of the dynasty. Some are even whispering of heresy... People are especially unsettled by our funeral rites. We brought shroud-leaves with us and have already placed a few free-thinkers inside them, and your servants started an uproar."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai appris que certaines de nos traditions dégoûtent les autres serviteurs de la dynastie. Certains nous traitent même d'hérétiques... Les gens semblent particulièrement choqués par nos rites mortuaires. Nous avons déjà placé quelques incrédules dans des linceuls de feuilles, mais vos serviteurs ont commencé à protester. »

languages.text: «Resulta que algunas de nuestras tradiciones resultan desagradables a otros sirvientes de la dinastía. Algunos incluso susurran que son herejía... La gente está especialmente incómoda con nuestros ritos funerarios. Trajimos hojas sudario y ya hemos colocado a algunos librepensadores en su interior, y sus sirvientes organizaron un alboroto al verlo».
languages.original_text: "It turns out that some of our traditions disgust the other servants of the dynasty. Some are even whispering of heresy... People are especially unsettled by our funeral rites. We brought shroud-leaves with us and have already placed a few free-thinkers inside them, and your servants started an uproar."

traits.locale_text: «Resulta que algunas de nuestras tradiciones resultan desagradables a otros sirvientes de la dinastía. Algunos incluso susurran que son herejía... La gente está especialmente incómoda con nuestros ritos funerarios. Trajimos hojas sudario y ya hemos colocado a algunos librepensadores en su interior, y sus sirvientes organizaron un alboroto al verlo».
